/usr/bin/clang++  --coverage -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  --coverage -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/Boss.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/ConfigManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/EndScenes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/Enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/FloatingTextManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/GameplayScene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/InputManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/LocalizationManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/MenuScene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/OptionsScene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/ParticleManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/ResourceManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/Utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RalphArcade.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o RalphArcade.app/Contents/MacOS/RalphArcade  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a _deps/spdlog-build/libspdlogd.a _deps/tracy-build/libTracyClient.a -framework IOKit -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -framework OpenGL _deps/raylib-build/raylib/external/glfw/src/libglfw3.a -framework IOKit -framework Cocoa -framework CoreFoundation
